name: ascom
description: Install ASCOM Platform 7.1.0 and ASCOM Developer tools, enabling .NET 3.5 if needed.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\ascom-verify.log'; if (Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\ASCOM') { Get-Item 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\ASCOM' | Format-List * | Out-File -FilePath $log } else { 'ASCOM registry key not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log }; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\ascom-smoke.txt') -Value 'ascom_ok'"
